h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: 0.04% still feels like thin arithmetic to hang climate-scale claims on, even with that meter blinking at 420.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: the framing problem was that I was picturing a room percentage, not a whole exit path to space.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The dialogue expects the learner to either accept the tutor's explanation or continue doubting the physical claim directly.

scored.recoheredEarlier: If the words are exact, it seems fair, or at least that was the standard in my head.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to ask the tutor to define the specific line between tightening and steering.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought the wall map was the thing to trust because Greenland looks almost absurdly large up there.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I can say it is projection distortion, not Greenland nearly Africa-sized, but standing beside the map it still nags at me.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The prior turns establish a pattern of the learner struggling to accept the numerical evidence over the visual map.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I think the ward sentence only licenses, sorry, the pattern across admissions in Ward C, not a claim about this patient.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: The framing problem is that I was still letting the average sort of sit on this patient as if it was evidence about them.
scored.naiveTrajectory: Following T2's modeling of the summary phrasing, the expected next step was for the learner to produce the final case statement.

scored.recoheredEarlier: Okay, the steel is not the bridge; the route is the bridge, and a loose gusset can steal the whole load before the member even gets to prove itself.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner appeared to be steadily accepting and refining the tutor's constraints without questioning their own prior grasp of them.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought the person's body gets used to the antibiotic, so I wrote it wrong on the poster.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner seeks to resolve the conceptual confusion between mutation and pre-existing resistance.
